overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tropical tribal village with wooden and stone architecture. The character moves from an elevated wooden walkway through open grassy areas with views of a massive ancient mesa settlement, passing NPC villagers before approaching a lit building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway along stone building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wooden platform next to a stone building, passing NPCs standing near the wall

notable_agents.action: NPC standing against the stone wall holding a large tool

entered.detail: tall stone wall with wooden beams and hanging vegetation
elevated wooden plank walkway with weathered texture
rough wooden fence railing along the right side
massive ancient stone structure with waterfalls visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated wooden platform attached to a stone building on the left. The walkway has a wooden railing on the right side overlooking a lower area. An NPC stands against the wall ahead, and the massive stone mesa city is visible in the far background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through grassy village outskirts

events.description: steps off wooden walkway onto dirt and grass path

agents.ego_description: walking down a dirt path toward two approaching NPCs, moving away from the wooden platform into open terrain

notable_agents.action: two NPCs walking toward the camera on the dirt path

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass
wooden wagon cart parked near the building

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the wooden platform onto a dirt path surrounded by tall grass. Two NPCs approach from ahead, walking toward the camera. The stone mesa remains visible in the background while a wooden cart sits parked to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with view of ancient mesa city

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the massive stone mesa structure with waterfalls

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass while looking up at the massive ancient structure in the distance, taking in the view

entered.detail: tall palm trees scattered throughout the grassy area
wooden structures built into the side of the mesa

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open grassy area with scattered palm trees. The camera tilts up to showcase the massive ancient mesa city dominating the skyline, revealing waterfalls and wooden scaffolding built into its sides. No other characters are nearby in this open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path lined with stone buildings and wooden fences

events.description: moves from open grassland into a more built-up village area with stone walls and wooden fences

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path bordered by wooden fences and stone buildings, moving deeper into the village

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near a stone building on the right side of the path

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running along the right side of the path
multi-level stone building with wooden stairs and platforms
low stone wall bordering the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more enclosed village area with a dirt path flanked by a wooden fence on the right and stone walls on the left. A multi-level stone building with external wooden stairs rises on the right, while the mesa city becomes smaller in the distance. An NPC stands near the building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone patio leading to building entrance with warm interior lighting

events.description: approaches building entrance with warm artificial light spilling out from the interior

agents.ego_description: walking toward a building entrance with an open doorway, passing by an outdoor seating area with NPCs

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting at a wooden table outside the building entrance

entered.detail: open doorway emitting warm orange light from the building interior
cobblestone patio area with wooden tables and benches
wooden outdoor furniture arranged near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stone building with an open doorway glowing with warm interior light. The ground transitions to paved stone tiles on a patio area with wooden tables and benches. An NPC sits at a table to the left as the character moves toward the entrance, leaving the wooden fence and stone wall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tribal village that transitions from elevated walkways and open vistas to an intimate, lit building entrance. It begins with the character walking along an elevated wooden platform beside a stone building, with a massive mesa city looming in the far distance. As the character descends onto a dirt path, the scene opens into a grassy area with palm trees and a parked wooden cart, where the camera tilts upward to fully reveal the waterfalls and scaffolding of the towering mesa. The path then narrows into an enclosed village section flanked by wooden fences and multi-level stone buildings, causing the distant city to recede from view. Finally, the environment shifts to a paved stone patio with wooden tables and benches as the character approaches a doorway glowing with warm interior light.
